steps.t: Lethi can be found in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. You have woken from a short rest to find the other Stout-axes in your cell awake as well.
Your rations can be found on a chunk of rubble near your bunk in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. Awoken by tremors and unlikely to find more rest, Lethi ha…
Your emptied plate of rations can be found near your bunk in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. You should add it to the pile of plates near the gate to your …
Vaski can be found in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. After setting your plate down, Vaski has called you over. You should talk to Vaski.
Vaski can be found in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. Vaski has heard several disquieting rumours in the Dark Tower and wishes to share them with you.
Lethi can be found in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. Frustrated with Vaski's recklessness, Lethi has put an end to the conversation.
Your bunk can be found in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. After a tense exchange between Lethi and Vaski, Lethi has suggested that you all try to rest in y…
Núluzagar can be found in the dungeons of Barad-dûr. You brief rest was interrupted by the harsh voice of the cultist, Núluzagar. You should hearken t…
